Product Creation Code
Course Outline
Here is a quick outline of the core video lessons for the вҖңProduct
Creation CodeвҖқ course. I would recommend printing this out and
checking off the lessons as you complete them. Since this is a вҖңwork
at your own paceвҖқ program, it can be easy to lose track of where you
left off. This outline will help you stay on task.
Enjoy the program!
